name: Christian

source_status: provisional regression benchmark, not signed-off QS truth
note: Christian is the repeated live benchmark. Treat historical IQ exports as failure evidence, not as the answer key. The offline harness pins printed-code extraction and room-footprint recovery; QS-priced opening truth is still pending Haydon signoff.

room_footprints.reason: Christian uses title-case room labels rather than all-caps labels. The parser must recover these without broadening to arbitrary note text.

routing_expectations.note: Routing is a regression rail, not signed-off QS truth. It proves the printed codes anchor to real room labels after title-case room recovery.

historical_iq_outputs.notes: Export required manual overflow lines for Lounge/Dining.
